title: Jamaican Starch Bowl
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the taste of Jamaica with a side of pilaf. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Jamaican seasoning blend and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
Add the starch and stir to combine. Cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the starch is lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the starch is tender.
While the starch is cooking, prepare the pilaf according to the package instructions.
To assemble the dish, divide the cooked starch between two bowls.
Top each bowl with a scoop of pilaf and garnish with chopped scallions.
